title: The edge case is everyone
speakers: Willie King (Business Development Manager, T-Mobile ), Lex Liley (Associate Director, Product Strategy, Kettle)
key_points: Most communication technology was built for an able-bodied world, and for the more than 11 million Americans who are Deaf or Hard of Hearing (DHH), a phone call can still be a barrier that T-Mobile set out to rethink.
Willie King (T-Mobile) and Lex Liley (Kettle) share how their teams partnered directly with the DHH community to challenge assumptions about voice communication.
The talk makes the case for inclusive design, arguing that solving hard accessibility challenges for those at the edges leads to better experiences for everyone.
